case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. HEATHER LEIGH DUKE et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT DUKE, HEATHER LEIGH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-19-2010
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, DESIGNATION OF NEW ATTORNEY APPEARING: MUREN, TARA SUBSTITUTED FOR BEYER, CHRISTOPHER AS ATTORNEY FOR DISCOVER BANK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE: SUMMONS; COMPLAINT; CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
